notes: This text is from Mamnoon Fine Foods (a retail/CPG product line), not the Mbar rooftop bar restaurant menu. No restaurant dish prices are listed anywhere in the text; only retail grocery product descriptions were captured. No beverage menu present.

dishes.name: Hummus
dishes.description: Traditional Beiruti Lebanese hummus with a clean balance between citrus and tahini, with fresh garlic. Light and creamy texture.
dishes.price_note: Retail grocery product — no price listed

dishes.name: Harra Hummus
dishes.description: Traditional hummus blended with harra hot sauce made from fermented Fresno chiles. Clean, mild heat cutting through creamy fresh hummus.
dishes.price_note: Retail grocery product — no price listed

dishes.name: Baba Ganoush
dishes.description: Smoky eggplants blended into a custardy, vegan dip with umami-forward flavor and a fresh finish.
dishes.price_note: Retail grocery product — no price listed

dishes.name: Muhammara
dishes.description: Red pepper paste and walnuts dip with pomegranate molasses for tangy sweetness.
dishes.price_note: Retail grocery product — no price listed

dishes.name: Mama Chips
dishes.description: Crispy, slightly thicker pita chips baked from fresh in-house pita bread made from white and wheat dough blend. Delightfully salted.
dishes.price_note: Retail grocery product — no price listed

dishes.name: Harra Hot Sauce
dishes.description: Hot sauce made with Fresno chilis for a slightly smoky and fruity flavor with cumin adding dusky notes.
dishes.price_note: Retail grocery product — no price listed

dishes.name: Za'atar
dishes.description: Chef-curated woodsy, tangy za'atar mix imported fresh from Lebanon.
dishes.price_note: Retail grocery product — no price listed

dishes.name: Falafel Wrap
dishes.description: Crispy falafel topped with kale, pickled cauliflower, za'atar roasted tofu and tarrator sauce, wrapped in homemade wheat pita.

dishes.name: Halloumi Cheese Wrap
dishes.description: Fried halloumi cheese with quinoa tabbouleh, pickled cabbage, and roasted garlic tahini, wrapped in homemade pita.

dishes.name: Sausage & Egg Kuku Wrap
dishes.description: Persian kuku omelette made with yogurt, parsley, cilantro, green onion, and dill, topped with spiced lamb sujuk sausage patty, cheese blend, pickled banana peppers, and garlic yogurt in fresh pita.

dishes.name: Veggie & Egg Kuku Wrap
dishes.description: Vegetarian kuku wrap topped with kale, fried onions, pickled cabbage, kashkaval and mozzarella cheese blend, and harra hot sauce, wrapped in fresh pita.

dishes.name: Shish Chicken Wrap
dishes.description: Yogurt-marinated chicken with harra hot sauce, caramelized onion labneh, kale salad, and pickled veggies in fresh pita.
